title: Xtra Indulgent Ukrainian Tomato Dumplings
description: A rich and velvety Ukrainian dish featuring tomato puree and dumplings, perfect for a cold winter evening. This ovo-vegetarian friendly recipe is cooked to perfection in a kazan cauldron.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, eggs, salt, black pepper, and dried dill, mixing until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape using a rolling pin.
Heat the vegetable oil in a kazan cauldron over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the cauldron and saute until softened.
Add the tomato puree to the cauldron and stir to combine with the onion.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes.
Add the dumplings to the cauldron, making sure they are covered with the tomato mixture.
Cook the dumplings for 15 minutes or until they float to the surface.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with chopped fresh dill if desired.
